prompt: A cinematic, dark gothic mystery movie poster. In the center, a lone man wearing a trench coat and fedora stands with his back to the viewer, looking up at a massive, imposing gothic clock tower. The clock face is illuminated, and the structure around it is shattering with dark fragments falling. The setting is a foggy, wet cobblestone square at night, illuminated by warm yellow streetlamps and glowing windows from surrounding European-style buildings. A full moon shines through cloudy skies. There are exactly 3 ravens: one perched on a stone monument on the left, and two flying in the sky. The monument on the left has engraved text "VERITAS IN UMBRA, TEMPUS NEMINI PARET". On the right, a wooden signpost has 3 directional arrows reading "Marktplatz", "Uhrenturm", and "Alte Gasse", with a small newspaper leaning against it reading "Die Uhr steht." and "Wer lügt?". The poster features elegant, slightly distressed serif Japanese typography. At the top, a horizontal tagline reads {argument name="top tagline" default="真夜中、時は止まり、嘘が動き出す。"}. On the upper left, a vertical tagline reads {argument name="side tagline" default="その鐘の音が、真実を葬った。"}. In the lower center, the large main title reads {argument name="main title" default="時計塔の殺人"}. Below the title is a smaller tagline "時を欺いたのは、誰だ。" followed by a dense block of realistic movie credits including director, cast, and crew names. At the very bottom, the release text {argument name="release date" default="2025年 秋 全国ロードショー"} is displayed alongside a website URL and rating logos. The entire poster is framed by a thin, ornate gold border.

In the center, a lone man wearing a trench coat and fedora stands with his back to the viewer, looking up at a massive, imposing gothic clock tower. The clock face is illuminated, and the structure around it is shattering with dark fragments falling. The setting is a foggy, wet cobblestone square at night, illuminated by warm yellow streetlamps and glowing windows from surrounding European-style buildings. A full moon shines through cloudy skies. There are exactly 3 ravens: one perched on a stone monument on the left, and two flying in the sky. The monument on the left has engraved text "VERITAS IN UMBRA, TEMPUS NEMINI PARET". On the right, a wooden signpost has 3 directional arrows reading "Marktplatz", "Uhrenturm", and "Alte Gasse", with a small newspaper leaning against it reading "Die Uhr steht." and "Wer lügt?". The poster features elegant, slightly distressed serif Japanese typography. At the top, a horizontal tagline reads {argument name="top tagline" default="真夜中、時は止まり、嘘が動き出す。"}. On the upper left, a vertical tagline reads {argument name="side tagline" default="その鐘の音が、真実を葬った。"}. In the lower center, the large main title reads {argument name="main title" default="時計塔の殺人"}. At the very bottom, the release text {argument name="release date" default="2025年 秋 全国ロードショー"} is displayed alongside a website URL and rating logos. breakdown.creativeCore: Gothic Mystery Movie Poster：Generates a cinematic movie poster for a dark mystery thriller featuring a detective, a clock tower, and customizable Japanese typography.
breakdown.subject: 文字符号
breakdown.text: 要求精确文字；文字是主视觉
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 电影海报、音乐封面、书籍封面、播客封面

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 海报/封面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: vertical, horizontal]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, cinematic]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
要求精确文字；文字是主视觉。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
